# PhysioByRutvi

PhysioByRutvi is a doctor-led home physiotherapy practice in Mumbai, India.

Primary practitioner:
- Dr Rutvi Gandhi
- PT, MPT
- Musculoskeletal and Sports Physiotherapy

Main service:
- One-on-one home-visit physiotherapy by Dr Rutvi Gandhi.
- The same specialist assesses, treats, tracks progress, and adjusts the recovery plan.
- Care is by appointment and delivered at the patient's home.

Service area:
- Bhayander
- Mira Road
- Dahisar
- Borivali
- Kandivali
- Malad
- Goregaon
- Jogeshwari
- Andheri
- Mumbai western suburbs

Conditions and services:
- Back and neck pain physiotherapy
- Sports injury rehabilitation
- Post-surgery rehabilitation
- Knee and joint pain physiotherapy
- Sciatica and nerve pain support
- Posture correction
- Frozen shoulder physiotherapy
- Geriatric mobility, balance, and fall-prevention
- Strength, conditioning, and guided recovery exercise

Languages:
- English
- Hindi
- Marathi
- Gujarati

Best booking path:
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918879475065
- Phone: +91 88794 75065
- Website: https://physiobyrutvi.in/

Important notes:
- PhysioByRutvi offers home visits, not a walk-in clinic.
- Commercials and visit availability are shared after the concern, suburb, and recovery need are understood.
- Patients should seek emergency medical care for acute medical emergencies, severe trauma, sudden neurological symptoms, chest pain, or any urgent red-flag condition.

Useful website pages:
- Home: https://physiobyrutvi.in/
- Conditions treated: https://physiobyrutvi.in/conditions/
- Condition details: https://physiobyrutvi.in/condition/
- About Dr Rutvi: https://physiobyrutvi.in/about/
- Marathi home: https://physiobyrutvi.in/mr/
- Gujarati home: https://physiobyrutvi.in/gu/
